Common.brandDescription: Premium Greek and Mediterranean food export specialists, serving wholesalers and retailers across Europe since 2008.

slide1.title: Greek & Mediterranean Food Export Specialists
slide1.subtitle: Premium Feta, Halloumi, Greek Yogurt and Mediterranean Products for European Retail & Food Service.

slide2.title: Authentic Taste. Reliable Supply.
slide2.subtitle: Supplying wholesalers, retailers and food service partners across Europe.

slide3.title: Serving Europe Since 2008
slide3.subtitle: Reliable export logistics for France, Italy, Spain and Belgium.

slide4.title: Tailored Solutions For Retail & Food Service
slide4.subtitle: Private label and Mediterranean food sourcing solutions.

preview.title: Our Mediterranean Heritage
preview.text1: SIMOS Mediterranean Food specializes in the selection and export of the finest Greek and Mediterranean products. With over 15 years of experience, we connect traditional producers with the European market.
preview.text2: Our commitment to quality and authenticity has made us a trusted partner for wholesalers and retailers across France, Italy, Spain, and Belgium.

Markets.title: Export Markets
Markets.description: We provide localized expertise and reliable supply chains across key European markets.
